subject: Re: ts_template_match got nothing
body:
Thanks, Alister.
Apparently, it is definitely the scaling. After deleting the gold, the 
range is extremely narrow. 
So I restored the average frame without deleting the gold and it works 
again.

Huy
On Wednesday, May 14, 2025 at 1:34:06 PM UTC-4 alist...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi Huy,
>
> Are you missing peaks that were previously present in your CC volume or 
> just peaks from the gold?
>
> I would also check that the tomogram scale hasn’t changed even if the 
> contents looks good
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
>
>
> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>
> On May 14, 2025, at 10:19, Huy Bui <huy...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> ﻿Hi all,
>
>
> I run ts_template_match. First run working really well. Then I realized 
> the gold particles got match a lot, so I delete the gold using fidder, 
> regenerate the tomogram and perform ts_template_match again. Now, I have no 
> match at all. The cc file is completely dark. The tomogram and the template 
> look fine. 
>
> Any idea why this doesn't work after fiducial removal?
>
> H
>
> --

>
